field_values.action_summary: The group reaches a swift river, seeing a beautiful meadow on the far side. Exhausted, they camp by the bank while the Tin Woodman begins building a raft. Dorothy falls asleep, dreaming of the Emerald City.
field_values.camera_intent: Wide sweeping shots of river and distant meadow; Medium shots of tin_woodman raft construction; Soft ethereal focus for dorothy dream sequence
field_values.end_state: scene resolves into the next narrative beat
movement_notes: Incremental progress of the raft construction
Lighting transition from dusk to night
field_values.transition_notes:
# Scene Contract: CH007_SC004

## Production Intent
Establish a transition from the dense forest to a river crossing point. The sequence must visually communicate physical exhaustion through character posture and lighting shifts, moving from dusk into night while introducing a sense of hope via the distant meadow view.

## Required Cast
- dorothy
- toto
- the_scarecrow
- tin_woodman
- cowardly_lion

## Required Environments
- swift_riverbank_and_meadow_view (Riverbank overlooking a beautiful meadow)

## Continuity Constraints
- Incremental progress of the raft construction
- Lighting transition from dusk to night

## Beat List
- BT001: Arrival at the riverbank
- BT002: Settling and labor
- BT003: Night falls and rest
- BT004: The Dream
field_values.dialogue_relevance: dialogue supports scene intent and continuity
